channel.title: +गद्यम् on देवेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +गद्यम् on देवेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: गरुडदण्डकम्
item.description: गरुडदण्डकम् ...{Loading}... शठकोपः (En) Source: TW In sanskrit poetry, each of the 4 Paadas of a sloka can have 26 letters. If the letters of each Paadas increase to 27,30,33,36 (other multiples of 3 beyond 27), then this slokam is recognized as a Dhandakam. The 3 lettered units are known as a GaNa. Thus a 27 lettered Paada will have 9 GaNaas.There is generally no restriction on the length of the Paada in a Dhandakam.
